story.iWant: DDD base classes (AggregateRoot, Entity, ValueObject, DomainEvent)
story.soThat: all domain models have consistent foundations
story.tasks: - Create framework/core/src/main/kotlin/com/axians/eaf/framework/core/domain/ - Implement AggregateRoot.kt with event tracking - Implement Entity.kt with identity-based equality - Implement ValueObject.kt base class - Implement DomainEvent.kt marker interface - Create common/ package with Money.kt, Quantity.kt, Identifier.kt - Create exceptions/ package with exception hierarchy - Write unit tests in framework/core/src/test/kotlin/ using Kotest - Test AggregateRoot event registration - Test Entity equality based on ID - Test ValueObject immutability - Run `./gradlew :framework:core:test` - all tests pass <5s - Commit: "Add DDD base classes and common types to framework/core"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Base classes implemented: - domain/AggregateRoot.kt (abstract base with identity) - domain/Entity.kt (abstract base with equals/hashCode) - domain/ValueObject.kt (abstract base for immutability) - domain/DomainEvent.kt (marker interface)
Common types implemented: Money.kt, Quantity.kt, Identifier.kt
Exception hierarchy: EafException, ValidationException, TenantIsolationException, AggregateNotFoundException
Unit tests for all base classes using Kotest
Module compiles and publishes to local Maven repository

doc.section: FR010: Hexagonal Architecture with Swappable Adapters
doc.snippet: The system shall implement hexagonal architecture where infrastructure components are swappable adapters isolated from domain logic.
doc.relevance: Defines requirement for domain layer foundation separate from infrastructure

doc.snippet: framework/core (Epic 1: Foundation) - DDD base classes including domain/AggregateRoot.kt, Entity.kt, ValueObject.kt, DomainEvent.kt. Common types: Money, Quantity, Identifier. Exception hierarchy: EafException, ValidationException, TenantIsolationException, AggregateNotFoundException.
doc.relevance: Complete structural specification for framework/core module and all required base classes

doc.snippet: framework/core ↑ (no dependencies - foundation). Core module has zero dependencies, serves as foundation for all other framework modules.
doc.relevance: Core module must be dependency-free foundation layer

doc.snippet: Error Handling (Domain): Arrow Either for functional purity, explicit error types. Domain returns Either<DomainError,Success>, Application throws Spring exceptions, REST returns RFC 7807.
doc.relevance: Defines Arrow Either pattern for domain error handling

doc.section: FR010: Hexagonal Architecture with Swappable Adapters
doc.snippet: Hexagonal Structure: Domain (Core) - Aggregates, commands, events, domain logic (no infrastructure dependencies). Ports - Interfaces defined by domain. Adapters - Infrastructure implementations. Module Structure: See architecture.md Section 5.
doc.relevance: Technical approach for hexagonal architecture and domain layer design

doc.snippet: MANDATORY: NO wildcard imports (every import explicit), NO generic exceptions (specific types only except infrastructure interceptors), Kotest ONLY (JUnit forbidden), Version Catalog REQUIRED (gradle/libs.versions.toml), Zero violations (ktlint, Detekt, Konsist).
doc.relevance: Enforced coding standards for all framework code

doc.section: Exception Handling - Domain Layer: Arrow Either Pattern
doc.snippet: Domain services return Either<DomainError,Success> for business operations. Use ensure() for validation, bind() for chaining operations. Specific exception types: ValidationError, BusinessRuleViolation.
doc.relevance: Arrow Either pattern for domain error handling

doc.snippet: Test-Driven Development is constitutionally mandated - not optional. All production code MUST be preceded by failing tests (Red-Green-Refactor). Enforcement: Git hooks, CI/CD 85%+ coverage, code review checklist, Pitest 60-70% mutation coverage.
doc.relevance: Mandatory TDD approach for all framework development

doc.snippet: Framework: Kotest 6.0.4 (MANDATORY - JUnit forbidden). Coverage Targets: 85% line coverage (Kover), 60-70% mutation coverage (Pitest). Unit tests: <30 seconds target.
doc.relevance: Testing framework requirements and performance targets

doc.snippet: MUST Follow: NO wildcard imports (explicit only), NO generic exceptions (specific types), Use Kotest NEVER JUnit, CRITICAL: Never mix JUnit and Kotest annotations, Integration tests preferred (Testcontainers), Version Catalog Required, Use Arrow for error handling (Either<Error,Success> in domain).
doc.relevance: Project-wide mandatory standards for Kotlin code

doc.snippet: Primary: Kotest (FunSpec, BehaviorSpec) - JUnit forbidden. Core Strategy: Constitutional TDD - test-first mandatory. Coverage: 85% line coverage, 60-70% mutation coverage minimum. Testing Pyramid: 40-50% unit (nullable), 30-40% integration.

artifact.snippet: plugins { id("eaf.kotlin-common") }. Dependencies: libs.bundles.kotlin, libs.bundles.arrow, testImplementation libs.bundles.kotest.
artifact.relevance: Existing build configuration showing plugin and dependency structure

artifact.snippet: Existing framework/core file showing current module structure with tenant/ package.
artifact.relevance: Module already has src/main structure; DDD classes will be in new domain/ package

artifact.snippet: abstract class AggregateRoot<ID : Identifier>(open val id: ID) { private val domainEvents = mutableListOf<DomainEvent>(); protected fun registerEvent(event: DomainEvent); fun clearEvents(); fun getEvents(): List<DomainEvent> }
artifact.relevance: Complete implementation pattern for AggregateRoot base class

artifact.snippet: abstract class Entity<ID : Identifier>(open val id: ID) { override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean { if (this === other) return true; if (other !is Entity<*>) return false; return id == other.id }; override fun hashCode(): Int = id.hashCode() }
artifact.relevance: Identity-based equality pattern for Entity base class

artifact.snippet: interface DomainEvent { val occurredAt: Instant; val eventId: UUID }
artifact.relevance: Marker interface for domain events with timestamp and correlation ID

artifact.snippet: Money: data class Money(val amount: BigDecimal, val currency: Currency) : ValueObject(). Quantity: data class Quantity(val value: BigDecimal, val unit: String) : ValueObject(). Identifier: interface Identifier { val value: String }
artifact.relevance: Common domain primitives for money, quantities, and identifiers

artifact.snippet: open class EafException(message: String, cause: Throwable? = null) : RuntimeException(message, cause). ValidationException, TenantIsolationException, AggregateNotFoundException extending EafException.
artifact.relevance: Framework exception hierarchy with specific exception types

dependency.usage: Core Kotlin runtime for all framework code
Functional programming with Either for domain error handling
Arrow FX for functional effects and coroutines
Kotest testing framework engine (MANDATORY - JUnit forbidden)
Kotest assertions for Arrow Either types
Shared Kotlin configuration with ktlint, Detekt, and quality gates

constraint.rule: NO wildcard imports - every import must be explicit
constraint.rationale: Build failure on violation - zero tolerance policy

constraint.rule: NO generic exceptions - always use specific exception types (except infrastructure interceptors)
constraint.rationale: Exception: Infrastructure interceptors for observability may catch generic Exception with @Suppress annotation and immediate re-throw
Never mix JUnit and Kotest annotations - JUnit @Disabled has no effect on Kotest tests

constraint.rule: Version Catalog REQUIRED - all dependency versions in gradle/libs.versions.toml
framework/core must have ZERO infrastructure dependencies
constraint.rationale: Core is foundation layer - no Spring, no Axon, no database, no HTTP

constraint.rule: Zero violations - ktlint, Detekt, Konsist must pass without warnings
constraint.enforcement: CI/CD pipeline blocks merge on violations

constraint.rule: Domain layer uses Arrow Either<DomainError,Success> - no exceptions for business logic
constraint.rationale: Functional error handling makes business failures explicit and type-safe

constraint.rule: Unit tests must complete in <5 seconds
constraint.enforcement: Build fails if test suite exceeds time limit
constraint.rationale: Fast feedback loop is essential for developer productivity

constraint.enforcement: Kover for line coverage, Pitest for mutation coverage (nightly)
constraint.rationale: Constitutional TDD mandate requires comprehensive test coverage

constraint.rule: ValueObjects must be immutable - use data classes with val properties
constraint.rationale: Value objects represent immutable concepts (money, quantities, identifiers)

interface.name: AggregateRoot<ID : Identifier>
interface.description: Base class for DDD aggregates with event registration and retrieval

method.name: registerEvent
method.description: Register domain event to be published after transaction

method.name: clearEvents
method.description: Clear all registered events (called after publishing)

method.name: getEvents
method.description: Retrieve all registered events for publishing

interface.name: Entity<ID : Identifier>
interface.description: Base class for DDD entities with identity-based equality

method.name: equals
method.description: Identity-based equality - two entities equal if same ID

method.name: hashCode
method.description: Hash based on entity ID for consistent collections behavior

interface.name: ValueObject
interface.description: Base class for DDD value objects - immutable by convention
interface.notes: Equality based on all properties (structural equality via data class)

interface.name: DomainEvent
interface.description: Marker interface for domain events with required temporal and correlation metadata

property.name: eventId
property.description: Unique event identifier for correlation and deduplication

interface.name: Money
interface.description: Value object for monetary amounts with currency

interface.name: Quantity
interface.description: Value object for quantities with units

property.name: unit
property.description: Unit of measurement (kg, liters, items, etc.)

interface.name: EafException
interface.description: Base exception for all EAF framework exceptions

interface.name: AggregateNotFoundException
interface.description: Exception when aggregate not found by ID

standards.standard: Framework: Kotest 6.0.4 (FunSpec or BehaviorSpec) - JUnit explicitly forbidden
Coverage: 85% line coverage minimum (Kover), 60-70% mutation coverage (Pitest nightly)
Performance: Full test suite <5 seconds for framework/core unit tests
TDD: Constitutional TDD - write failing test first (Red-Green-Refactor cycle)
Style: Use FunSpec with "should" naming for behavior tests
Assertions: Use Kotest assertions (shouldBe, shouldNotBe, shouldThrow, etc.)
Arrow: Use kotest-assertions-arrow for Either assertions (shouldBeRight, shouldBeLeft)
Isolation: Each test must be independent with no shared mutable state

location.description: Unit tests for DDD base classes (AggregateRoot, Entity, ValueObject, DomainEvent)
Unit tests for common types (Money, Quantity, Identifier implementations)

idea.name: AggregateRoot Event Registration Tests
idea.description: Test that AggregateRoot can register domain events and retrieve them. Verify events are stored in order, clearEvents() removes all events, and getEvents() returns immutable copy.
idea.test-cases: - should register single domain event - should register multiple domain events in order - should clear all registered events - should return immutable copy of events (modifications don't affect original) - should handle empty event list

idea.name: Entity Identity-Based Equality Tests
idea.description: Test that Entity equality is based solely on ID, not object reference or other properties. Verify hashCode consistency and collections behavior.
idea.test-cases: - should be equal when same ID (different instances) - should not be equal when different IDs - should be equal to itself (reflexive) - should have consistent hashCode for same ID - should work correctly in HashSet (no duplicates with same ID) - should work correctly in HashMap as key

idea.name: ValueObject Immutability Tests
idea.description: Test that ValueObject implementations are immutable. Verify structural equality (all properties) and data class behavior.
idea.test-cases: - should be equal when all properties equal (structural equality) - should not be equal when any property differs - should have consistent hashCode for same values - should support copy() with property changes (data class) - should be usable as Map keys

idea.name: DomainEvent Interface Tests
idea.description: Test that DomainEvent implementations have required metadata (occurredAt, eventId). Verify timestamp and correlation ID uniqueness.
idea.test-cases: - should have non-null occurredAt timestamp - should have non-null eventId UUID - should generate unique eventId for each instance - should preserve timestamp value - should be usable as marker interface for polymorphic collections

idea.name: Money Value Object Tests
idea.description: Test Money value object with amount and currency. Verify immutability, equality, and BigDecimal precision.
idea.test-cases: - should create Money with amount and currency - should be equal when amount and currency equal - should not be equal when amount differs - should not be equal when currency differs - should preserve BigDecimal precision - should handle zero amounts - should handle negative amounts (debt representation)

idea.name: Quantity Value Object Tests
idea.description: Test Quantity value object with value and unit. Verify immutability, equality, and unit handling.
idea.test-cases: - should create Quantity with value and unit - should be equal when value and unit equal - should not be equal when value differs - should not be equal when unit differs - should preserve BigDecimal precision - should handle various unit types (kg, liters, items, etc.) - should handle zero quantities

idea.name: Identifier Interface Tests
idea.description: Test Identifier implementations with string value. Verify type-safety and equality.
idea.test-cases: - should create identifier with string value - should be equal when values equal - should not be equal when values differ - should work with different identifier types (OrderId, WidgetId, etc.) - should prevent mixing different identifier types in collections

idea.name: Exception Hierarchy Tests
idea.description: Test exception hierarchy with EafException base and specific subtypes. Verify inheritance, message, and cause propagation.
idea.test-cases: - should create EafException with message - should create EafException with message and cause - should create ValidationException with message - should create TenantIsolationException with message - should create AggregateNotFoundException with aggregateId and type - should be catchable as EafException (polymorphism) - should be catchable as RuntimeException - should preserve stack trace

idea.name: Base Class Composition Tests
idea.description: Test that base classes can be composed correctly (e.g., AggregateRoot using Entity, ValueObject in aggregates).
idea.test-cases: - should create concrete aggregate extending AggregateRoot - should create concrete entity extending Entity - should use Identifier in AggregateRoot and Entity - should register DomainEvent from concrete aggregate - should use Money and Quantity in concrete aggregates

idea.name: Performance Tests
idea.description: Verify all unit tests complete in <5 seconds total. No external dependencies or I/O operations.
idea.test-cases: - should run all framework/core tests in <5 seconds - should have no test using Thread.sleep() or delays - should have no test with external I/O (files, network, databases) - should use in-memory only operations
